message:
fix(fcp-oauth): align DeviceCode grant_type serde with OAuth spec

Add explicit serde rename attribute to GrantType::DeviceCode to serialize
as "urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:device_code" per RFC 8628 Section 3.4.

Previously the snake_case rename_all would serialize as "device_code", but
the OAuth Device Authorization Grant spec requires the URN format. The
Display impl already used the correct value; this aligns serde to match.

Closes: bd-2yvw

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
